title: paspalum coryphaeum
intro: Paspalum coryphaeum, also known as Broom Sedge or Paspalum, is a type of grass native to tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Paspalum coryphaeum include its ability to aid in the treatment of digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections. Paspalum coryphaeum is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
